title: Western Odisha Turning into a Gas Chamber! Mercury Hits 40.6°C Before Noon! - Kanak News Odisha
full_text:
Is Western Odisha becoming a gas chamber? The scorching heatwave is reaching record-breaking levels, making life unbearable for thousands.
As temperatures soar, Western Odisha continues to reel under a brutal heatwave. By 11:30 AM today, Sambalpur recorded a staggering 40.6°C, and the mercury is only rising. To make matters worse, frequent power cuts amid this intense heat and humidity have left the public in complete distress. People are struggling to cope as the region faces an unprecedented climate crisis.
Watch this video to see the ground reality in Sambalpur and why the public is demanding urgent action against power failures during this extreme heatwave.
